narrative_beat: Wide establisher of massive brutalist P&B pyramid with three giant engraved slogans on face, tiny crimson-robed figure climbing at base

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a colossal brutalist white concrete pyramid with three enormous engraved slogans on its face
subject.focal_point: the three slogans WAR IS PEACE / FREEDOM IS SLAVERY / IGNORANCE IS STRENGTH at massive scale
subject.secondary: A tiny figure in crimson robe ascending the steps at the base. Stormy desaturated crimson-red sky.

composition.rule: centered symmetry with pyramid at frame center
composition.foreground: tiny climbing figure in rich crimson

lighting.key_light: harsh overhead directional light on pyramid face

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the four Ministries as absolute power

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content:
WAR IS PEACE
FREEDOM IS SLAVERY
IGNORANCE IS STRENGTH
in_scene_text.font_style: gigantic carved brutalist English capital letters in weathered concrete
in_scene_text.medium: engraved into the pyramid face, three stacked monumental lines
in_scene_text.placement: center of the pyramid face, occupying upper 60 percent

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
